title: /a/ - Anime & Manga Directory
description:
Boards competing to host the /a/ directory on 5chan. The highest-scoring board resolves the directory code; if it goes offline, 5chan rotates to the next-highest. Anyone can open a PR on this file to add their board.

https://github.com/bitsocialnet/lists/blob/master/5chan-directories/5chan-a-directory.json
